news-global-econ.title: Risky 'airport theory' has travelers cutting arrival time for flights 'way too close,' says expert
news-global-econ.description: The viral "airport theory" trend has flight travelers arriving just 15 minutes before boarding, in a risky gamble to avoid terminal waits. Online searches have surged 11,000%.

news-global-soc.title: IOC releases statement after US and Israel strike Iran
news-global-soc.description: IOC releases statement on U.S. and Israel strikes on Iran, reaffirming Olympic neutrality principle amid questions about potential Olympic truce violations and calls for penalties.
